landlord reveals the good news to accept tenant

the landlord has not requested any additional documents or references from the tenant since the application was submitted
the tenant's phone display shows an incoming call from the landlord's number
the tenant receives a text message from the landlord saying 'I have made my decision, please give me a call'

steps: Remember where the car is parked
Lift right leg up off the ground
Extend right leg forward in the direction of the car
Lift left leg up off the ground
Extend left leg forward in the direction of the car
Continue lifting and extending legs until arrival at the car
loop_step: Continue lifting and extending legs until arrival at the car
descriptions: The car is still visible at a distance and not directly in front of me.
I have not yet reached the point where I can touch the car's door handle.
The GPS coordinates of my position still differ from the car's parking location.
The car's door handle is within your grasp.
The car's ultrasonic parking sensor indicates an obstacle at 0.2 meters.
The car's telematics system logs that the smartphone GPS coordinate matches the parked location.
The sun is setting, casting long shadows on the ground.
A gentle breeze is blowing from the east, rustling the leaves.
The tracking page still shows the status as 'Out for delivery'.
The estimated delivery time window has passed but no delivery confirmation has appeared.
The automated delivery confirmation email has not been sent to your inbox.
a delivery confirmation notification appears on your phone
the carrier's GPS shows the delivery vehicle has been at your address and left, matching the delivery window
the living room carpet is beige

descriptions: the transport vehicle is not visible at the designated arrival area
the online tracking system shows the transport status as 'in transit' and not yet 'delivered'
the pre-arranged electronic notification for arrival has not been triggered and the driver has not reported reaching the destination
the transport vehicle is parked at the receiving dock
a notification from the transport company confirms delivery completion
the GPS tracking system shows the transport unit has been stationary at the facility location for over five minutes, indicating arrival

steps: Stop in front of the refrigerator
Reach hand toward the refrigerator door
Begin pulling on the refrigerator door
Continue pulling until the door is opened
loop_step: Continue pulling until the door is opened
descriptions: The refrigerator door is still touching the fridge body along the top edge.
The door has been pulled outward only a few inches, leaving most of the rubber gasket still in contact.
The door's hinges have not yet reached their full extension, so the door is not at its maximum open position.
The refrigerator door is fully open.
The door's magnetic seal has separated from the refrigerator body.
The pulling force on the door has decreased to zero as the door has reached its fully open position.
there is a magnet shaped like a cow on the door

steps: Start car and drive to zoo
descriptions: No empty parking spaces are visible in the current row.
The parking lot's full sign is still illuminated at the entrance.
The parking lot's occupancy counter shows that all 500 spaces are taken, and no vehicles have left in the last five minutes.
an empty parking space is visible ahead
the parking lot's electronic sign shows 'spaces available'
a car pulls out of a parking spot, leaving it empty
The zoo's main gate has a colorful banner advertising a new reptile house.
Your car's radio is tuned to a classic rock station.

steps: place pot with water on stove
place a lid on the pot
allow the water to get hot
wait for the water to boil
add salt to the water and stir
loop_step: wait for the water to boil
descriptions: The water in the pot is not yet at a rolling boil, only occasional small bubbles rise to the surface.
The steam rising from under the lid is thin and wispy, not a steady strong flow.
The lid is still cool to the touch on top, indicating insufficient steam production.
The water surface is covered with rapidly rising large bubbles that burst at the surface.
The water temperature has reached 100 degrees Celsius as measured by a thermometer.
The rate of steam emission from under the lid has become constant and the sound of boiling is a steady, unchanging rumble.
the kitchen window is slightly open
a small potholder rests near the stove

The doorman's tally counter shows fewer entries than the total expected guests.
